text: We have stable production lines and sufficient production capacity. We can ensure normal order production even in peak seasons. We will not delay the delivery time at will. We will clearly inform the production cycle when receiving orders. We can also synchronize the progress at any time during production so that you know well and do not delay the sales season.Fourth our after-sales service is responsible. We do long-term business, not one-time transactions. If there are a very small number of quality problems missed in inspection, we will actively cooperate with the handling. We will reissue or coordinate as needed and never shift responsibilities. Let every cooperative customer have no worries.We support a variety of cooperation methods. The first is spot wholesale. There are frequent best-selling styles and basic styles, suitable for rapid replenishment, trial orders and store start-ups. The purchase is flexible and the delivery is fast. The second is customized orders. We can make according to drawings and samples. We can help with pattern making, adjust details and optimize technology. We support OEM, customized logo and customized packaging to create your own brand style. The third is long-term stable supply, suitable for cross-border sellers, offline chains and regional wholesalers. We can arrange orders monthly and quarterly to ensure continuous and stable supply.Regarding the minimum order quantity, we will not blindly set high thresholds. We support small-batch trial orders, allowing new customers to experience quality and test the market first, and then cooperate for a long time after satisfaction. For old customers with large quantities, we will give more favorable prices and priority order scheduling rights.Many overseas customers worry about communication problems. We have professional docking personnel who can smoothly communicate order details, style requirements and delivery arrangements. No matter which country or region you are from, we can clearly communicate with you efficiently without delay or perfunctoriness.Some friends will also ask how to get style drawings, quotations and samples to check the quality. You can directly send us a private message, leave your contact information and needs. We will arrange special personnel to connect with you as soon as possible, send product styles, detailed quotations and cooperation processes. We support checking samples first and then talking about large goods. Samples can truly reflect our workmanship, fabrics and shapes, making you more confident to take goods.We have been running a factory for many years, and the most important thing is word of mouth. The willingness of customers to repurchase and introduce new customers is our greatest recognition. Whether you are a new wholesaler or a large purchaser with stable sales volume, we treat everyone equally, take every order seriously and make every batch of goods carefully.
